name: T4.4-real-screen-synthetic-camera-1440p
description: T4.2 shape but the camera is SYNTHETIC. Real screen capture (SCStream buffers, WindowServer IOSurface pool) + synthetic 1280x720 camera (harness-allocated CVPixelBuffer pool) + composited HLS 1440p + ProRes 4K + raw H.264 camera writer. Isolates screen-capture-vs-camera-capture as the real-capture differentiator. Interpretation: if T4.2 hangs and T4.4 hangs too → screen capture is the trigger. If T4.2 hangs and T4.4 passes → camera capture is the trigger.
